safeDirectoryWildcard._comment: Adds safe.directory='*' globally so git stops complaining about 'dubious ownership' on Windows. Same effect as `.\run.ps1 gsa`. Disable if you want per-repo entries instead.

lfsFilters._comment: Bakes in the Git LFS smudge/clean/process filters globally. Normally `git lfs install` already does this -- this block re-asserts them in case the LFS install step was skipped or the filters got wiped.

urlRewrites._comment: url.<base>.insteadOf rewrites. Forces SSH for GitHub + GitLab so cloning HTTPS URLs (e.g. from a browser) silently uses your SSH key instead of prompting for a password / PAT. Disable if you actually want HTTPS auth.
